generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are increasingly relying on U.S. taxpayers to fund their own defense? While we're committed to our alliances, it's time to ask: why should we bear the burden alone? Studies show that many European nations spend far below the agreed 2% of GDP on defense. Let's ensure our security comes first by encouraging fair burden-sharing. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
